summary: Update Commitment Change Order Line Item
description: Updates a line item for a given commitment change order.

parameters.name: commitment_change_order_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Commitment Change Order.

data.description: A row on a schedule of values.

prime_line_item_id.description: ID of the prime contract line item associated with this line item

commitment_line_item_id.description: ID of the commitment contract line item associated with this line item

unit_cost.description: An "unformatted" decimal number. Specifically a number with a period as the decimal separator, without a thousands separator, and with an optional sign. It should be assumed that this number includ...

amount.description: An "unformatted" decimal number. Specifically a number with a period as the decimal separator, without a thousands separator, and with an optional sign. It should be assumed that this number includ...

position.description: Position of the line item within the schedule of values

wbs_code.description: WBS Code details for the line item

work_breakdown_structure.description: An object describing the values associated with this line item along the requested axes of the work breakdown structure. Each key corresponds to an axis and each value corresponds to a value along ...

prime_line_item_id.description: ID of the prime contract line item associated with this line item

commitment_line_item_id.description: ID of the commitment contract line item associated with this line item

amount.description: Amount - this field is nullable on unit quantity SOVs but NOT amount-based SOVs. For line item creates, if this field is omitted on unit quantity SOVs,  the amount will be calculated as quantity * ...

quantity.description: Quantity - only accepted on unit quantity SOVs

unit_cost.description: Unit cost - only accepted on unit quantity SOVs

uom.description: Unit of measure - only accepted on unit quantity SOVs
enum: Any value present in the Company list of Units of Measure
